g.text: EVSE turns on Control Pilot Oscillator with Default Duty Cycle
EV Detects EVSE is Ready and Closes Pilot Switch S2 to Initiate Charging
EVSE Changes Control Pilot Duty Cycle to Adhere to Charging Profile
EVSE Periodically Changes Control Pilot Duty Cycle to Adhere to Charging Profile
EVSE Changes Control Pilot Duty Cycle to Adhere to Charging Profile
Optional if chargingState changes based on new schedule
End Charging and Stop OCPP Transaction
